name_cn:
OnTheGo Small Series | CODE:M46373
2023 Early Spring Collection [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Size: 25 x 19 x 11.5cm
The best choice for this season's new arrivals in the OnTheGo Small Series.
OnTheGo Small handbag features a mix of Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, accented with Monogram Giant patterns. The Toron handle and jacquard shoulder strap with brand embossing create a visual contrast, while the detachable coin pouch is perfect for coins or small essentials. Combining fashion and versatility, the designer truly understands every woman.
